main_thesis: The book argues that the central problem becomes clearer when evidence, concepts, and counterarguments are staged separately.

thesis_variants.bold: The existing debate cannot be understood without this staged account.
thesis_variants.moderate: The staged account clarifies several tensions in the debate.
thesis_variants.conservative: The staged account is a useful organizing framework.
thesis_variants.public_facing: The book shows why the familiar story is incomplete.
thesis_variants.research: The book offers a bounded synthesis of competing explanations.

thesis_claims.claim: The introduction must establish the problem before advancing the thesis.
thesis_claims.warrant: Readers need a shared object of inquiry before evaluating claims.
thesis_claims.evidence_needed: Published debate overview and source examples.
thesis_claims.counterargument: A stronger narrative opening might make the problem vivid first.

hidden_assumptions: The audience accepts research evidence standards.
The chapter order can shape reader interpretation.
weak_links: The synthesis needs sources that disagree with the thesis.
